attributes.name: [Airflow OTel] DAG run schedule delay high

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.dagrun.schedule_delay IS NOT NULL
// Timer values are in SECONDS (OTel statsd receiver convention)
// Threshold 300 = 5 minutes delay; adjust for your SLA
| STATS max_delay_sec = MAX(airflow.dagrun.schedule_delay)
| WHERE max_delay_sec > 300
